items.desc:
2016 - Intermediate School Certificate (Secondary School Diploma)
2019 - General University Entrance Qualification (Abitur)

- Computer Science (B.Sc.) (Change of Major)
- Interrupted by military service

- Operation and management of optoelectronic surveillance systems (TOD)
- incl. COVID-19-related delays

items.title: Raidian I
items.excerpt:
- Development of a self-balancing two-wheeled robot
- Balance control via MPU6050 sensor and PID controller
- Control: Raspberry Pi 5 + ESP32 (MicroPython)
- Independent design and manufacturing from raw materials
- Project completed. Insights gained feed into Raidian II

items.title: Veritas Encryptor (Python, Open Source)
items.excerpt:
- File encryption software with sequential
dual-encryption method (ChaCha20-Poly1305 + AES-GCM)
- Key derivation via Argon2id + HKDF
- Cross-platform (Windows / Linux)

items.title: Raidian II
items.excerpt:
- Autonomous cargo transport robot
- Track drive with industrial motors, aluminum frame
- Control: Raspberry Pi 5 + ESP32 (MicroPython)
- Planned: Camera-based obstacle detection, relative positioning (encoder + IMU), target navigation via beacon/coordinates
- Independent design and manufacturing from raw materials (electrics in progress)
- Planned as the basis for the bachelor's thesis

items.title: Gamified Fitness App (Team Project, Seminar)
items.excerpt:
- Client: The Sphere Fitness Studio, Darmstadt
- Implementation of the Firebase authentication system and app interface (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
- Hosting via Netlify

items.title: TransVisEd (Team Project, Bachelor Practical)
items.excerpt:
- Multi-user transcript editor
- Developed for the Multimodal Digital Oral History project of the International Digital Oral History Lab, Institute of History, TU Darmstadt
- Used as core infrastructure of the MDOH project
- Implementation of the authentication system (Firebase + SQL)
- Development of the communication layer between backend, frontend, and database (PHP)
